intent: Romantic date night, beautiful atmosphere, great cocktails, Instagram-worthy presentation

mockPlace.name: PAI
mockPlace.address: 18 Duncan St, Toronto, ON M5H 3G8, Canada

mockReviews.author: JAY KAY
mockReviews.text: The food was very delicious! Fresh and full of flavours. The staff was very friendly and attentive. The restaurant was clean and well-maintained. I would definitely recommend this restaurant to anyone looking for a great dining experience.

mockReviews.author: Mika Kim
mockReviews.text: Delicious Thai food, made even better by the warm and attentive staff. The portions were generous and the prices were reasonable for the quality. Only downside was the wait time on a Friday evening.

mockReviews.author: Angie R
mockReviews.text: The mango salad had flavors that tickled all the senses. Yum! I'm going to crave this one forever and ever. The khao soi was rich and creamy with just the right amount of spice. Authentic northern Thai comfort food at its best.

mockReviews.author: David Chen
mockReviews.text: Overhyped. The food is good but not exceptional. The spice level seems toned down compared to actual Thai street food. The pad thai was sweet, not the tangy version you'd get in Bangkok. Decor is Instagram-worthy though.

mockReviews.author: Sarah M
mockReviews.text: Beautiful restaurant with amazing food presentation. The cocktails were incredible and the atmosphere was perfect for our anniversary dinner. Everything was beautifully plated and the service was top notch.

humanRationale: Multiple reviewers mention beautiful decor, Instagram-worthy plating, anniversary dinner atmosphere, and great cocktails. This intent aligns perfectly with what most reviewers praised.
